description_long: This object is a large, flat-screen television with a sleek, modern design. The front features a wide, glossy black display with minimal bezels, giving it a contemporary and immersive appearance. The side views reveal an ultra-thin profile, with a slight bulge at the lower back where the electronics and ports are housed. The back panel is matte black and includes a central mounting area and visible ventilation grilles, as well as a recessed section likely containing input/output ports. The television sits on a low-profile, sturdy stand that supports its wide frame. Its overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on maximizing screen real estate.
description: A large, ultra-thin flat-screen television with a glossy black display, minimal bezels, and a low-profile stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, glossy black screen with minimal bezels and a subtle stand at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile and the slight bulge at the lower back for electronics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back panel, central mounting area, ventilation grilles, and recessed port section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the thin profile and the protruding lower back section.
attribute_bezel_design: thin, black, glossy plastic bezel with minimal thickness
